1.content:
On warm summer days like this one, most of the town inhabitants where at the pool to cool down, this included you and your two friends, your name is David, you're twelve years old with green eyes and brown long hair going a little past your shoulders.
Your friends name is Dalton, he's thirteen with blue hair in a bit of a Bieber hairstyle, and your other friend were Ben, a ten year old boy with black hair and short brown hair.

The three of you were hanging out in the pool, relaxing, while also at the same time keeping an eye out for vulnerable potential victims, the three of you had hunted together before and you trusted one another.

"Hey guys, look at that" Dalton says and points to a lone six year old in the middle of the pool, the boy seems to have a hard time staying above surface.

You all look at each other with hungry smiles, "Okay, who should get the first one this time?" you ask your friends.

"well, i wouldn't mind" Ben says shyly, you and Dalton smiles at each other and...
1.title: The Pool

choices: Six year old pov (digestion)
Ben relaxes and digests his recent meal
You feel happy for Ben, then you spot a fitting meal
Dalton sees a fitting meal
Someones appear from behind
11.content:
Ben nods and smiles with excitement, he begins casually swimming towards the struggling six year old, when he's maybe four yards away he disappear beneath the surface, all of a sudden the six year old begin screaming for help.

"Ooooh, AAAAH! HELP ME, SOMEONE'S GOT MY FOOT!" but none of the boys around seemed to care, the town had an survival of the fittest mentality.

Boy pov:
You feel how your feet are pushed together and held in place by something much warmer than the pool water, whatever it was it began to slide up over your body, you felt your feet push through into a slimy sack that began to expand to accommodate you, and you understood that someone was swallowing you.
Your predator had now reached your neck when he appeared above the surface with you firmly in between his lips.

Ben gulped rapidly, sending the six year old boy on his way to fulfill his fate as food for a bigger and stronger boy.
"URRRRPH" Ben licked his lips and with a satisfied smile returned to his friends.
11.title: Well, go for it then you tell Ben

choices: You decided to swim up to the surface to breath
The little boy manage to pull his legs out of your maw
This boy will get in your belly NOW!
Someone grabs the six year old and pull him away
The small boy hurts your face and you let go
12.content:
"So this one's mine!" you say.
You climb up to the pools edge and stretch your arms up into the air, the sun glistered over your wet young body.
Then you dove down into the pool with your hands outstretched above your head while doing strokes with his legs, quickly gliding closer the the six year olds kicking feet, you could now make out the plump belly of the boy, he still had a lot of baby fat left on him, your mouth began to salivate.
You grab both of his small feet and hold them together while you shove them into your mouth and down your throat, you make quick work of his legs gulping them down your gullet towards your impatient rumbling belly.
The six year old disappeared beneath the surface, nobody seemed to pay him any attention, except your two friends that enjoyed the show from the other side of the pool.
The little boy looked down and the two of you made eye contact, he began to angrily push against your face with his small hands, this slowed down your swallowing, you felt the need for fresh air.
12.title: Naah, you got to eat first the last time

choices: You slurp the other boy up your butt anyway
You stay true to your word and let the other boy out
Follow the boy's journey
121.content:
Still with the little boy firmly in between your jaws you decide to swim to the surface to get some air into your lungs.
As soon as you got up the boy began to scream and plead for anyone to help him, most of the other boys in the area didn't care at all, but one little boy at the same age as your prey mustered up his courage to help his friend, he threw himself into the pool and swam towards his friends arms, but you managed to grab him before he could reach, you had to think fast, you pulled down your swim trunks and shoved the other boys head up your arse, you pushed him up to his shoulders then your rectum muscles were able to begin sucking him in on its own.

"No! Please, let my friend go" the boy in your mouth cries.
"You can eat me, p..please just let him go, he's my best friend" he continues weeping.
"Okah, bu yo hae to lesh me eas yo firsh"
With that the little boy quits his struggle and let his body go limp.
He now slid effortlessly down your throat towards your hungry belly.
121.title: You decided to swim up to the surface to breath

choices: Dalton walks up and confront the blonde boy
The blonde boy sees Dalton coming towards him
You decide to get up and prepare to help Dalton if things go sour
You and Ben stays were you are
Dalton have a change of heart and asks the blonde boy to team up
15.content:
Your planing with your friends abruptly ends when you see the six year old all of a sudden disappear beneath the waters surface, nothing happens for a second, then a boy appears on the same spot were the six year old just were, but it wasn't him, it was an other boy, he slowly swam towards the pool's ladder, he grabbed the ladder and slowly climbed up, both you and your friends found yourself staring in awe at the blonde haired boy's bulging belly that became visible as he climbed up.

The blonde boy walked over to a sun chair and laid back and let his stomach sway freely, it's occupant still unwilling to accept it's place in the food chain.

"Oooh oh well, guess we'll have to find someone else" You mutter.

"Screw that!" Dalton says, "i ain't gonna let blondie there get away with steeling our meal!" with that Dalton climbs up from the pool and walks over to were the blonde boy were sitting.
"Haha, this will be good" you say to Ben
"Think he can take him?"
"Haha, highly doubt it..."
15.title: All of a sudden the six year old is pulled down...

choices: The blonde's facial expression changes and he looks calmly up on Dalton
Dalton decides to eat the blonde with the six year old inside
An other boy interferes
151.content:
"HEY! Blondie! you took something that belongs to me!"
The blonde boy lifts his head from the back rest, "Oh? What could that be?" The blonde asks with a grin on his lips.
"You know damn well what i am talking about. The kid!! he was mine!"
"Oh, i guess y- URRRPH! ermm, scuse me, i guess you just gonna have to take him back then if you want him so badly" the blonde stated calmly.
"That's what i intend to, question is, do you wanna get out of this alive, if so, you better puke him up right this instance!"
Dalton says coldly.
"Ooor else?..." the blonde response in a cocky tone.

The manners of this kid... its more than Dalton can handle, all of a sudden Dalton looses his temper, he throws himself right at the blonde boy, the blonde lets out an yelp in surprise as the thirteen year old crashes onto him.
The sun chair breaks under their added weight and Dalton is on top of the blonde, he grabs each of the blondes arms and pins them to the ground right above his head, Dalton were sitting on the blondes bare chest.
151.title: Dalton walks up and confront the blonde boy

info.brief_description: Tales of Vore from boy's town
info.description:
Boy's Town as the name intales is a town consisting of only boys bellow the age of eighteen, it used to be a normal town until the boys decided to overthrow the grown ups

Three rules:
All kinds of vore is allowed
No female interaction is allowed
Chapters can just be a maximum of 1000 characters.
If absolutely necessary up to 1100 characters is no biggie, but aim at a thousand.
